commit.message: Add null / empty string note to ZipEntry::setComment. Use "an empty string" consistently.
Lift null and empty string note into the method description
Change "the empty string" to "an empty string"
Add note to @param comment specification that the comment may be set to null or the empty string to produce no ZIP file comment
Update spec according to review suggestion
Update ZipOutputStream.setComment to declare that it throws IllegalArgumentException for unmappable characters in comment
